description: The CubemapAssetMetadata component is used to display info about any particular cube map provided.

fields.Size: The size in pixels of the width or height of any 1 of the 6 sides. (The sides are the same size)
fields.HasMipMaps: Whether the cubemap has mipmap data.
fields.MipMapCount: How many mip map resolution variants the cubemap has.
fields.MemoryBytes: How much memory the cubemap takes up.
fields.FormattedMemoryBytes: The bytes formatted into a readable string.
fields.Format: The texture format of the cube map.
fields.ActualLoadedVariant: The Asset variant Type currently loaded.
fields.Profile: The color profile being used for this texture when rendering it.
